context: Built comprehensive modular grant application document from PDF deck, V3 proposal, web research on active programs (Solana Frontier Hackathon Apr 6-May 11, Solana Mobile Builder Grants RFP). Document covers: elevator pitches, problem/solution, traction ($3K revenue, 11 dApps), competitive landscape, team, technical architecture, roadmap, budget, ecosystem impact. Includes ready-to-paste appendices for Frontier Hackathon (Infrastructure category), Solana Mobile RFP grant, and general Web3 grants. Pre-written answers to common grant questions. Pre-submission checklist.
